Anna.primary_clothing: light-blue dress, veiled hat with a powder blue ribbon
Anna.face_description: soft oval face with delicate features and a beautiful pair of eyes that convey deep sorrow
Anna.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, light-blue dress, veiled hat with a powder blue ribbon, beautiful melancholic eyes
Anna.color_palette: light blue, powder blue, pale ivory, soft brown
Anna.accessories: Hat with a light blue ribbon
Anna.source_notes: Context of the family meeting in the living room.

Joyce Meyer.primary_clothing: Black Victorian formal suit, white shirt, dark cravat
Joyce Meyer.face_description: Sharp aquiline nose, haggard and slightly gaunt face from a recent ordeal, eyes expressing joy and relief.
Joyce Meyer.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, short blond hair, prominent aquiline nose, wearing a haggard black Victorian formal suit.
Joyce Meyer.color_palette: blond gold, charcoal black, pale ivory, stark white
Joyce Meyer.source_notes: Joyce recounts his journey from Caesar Pier to Enmat Harbor.

Nast.primary_clothing: Victorian pirate captain attire, dark heavy leather coat, tricorne hat, gold embroidery
Nast.face_description: Weathered skin with sharp, authoritative eyes and a firm jawline. Looks like a seasoned commander of the seas.
Nast.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male pirate captain, tanned weathered skin, sharp dark brown eyes, wearing a dark leather coat and a tricorne hat, imposing presence.
Nast.color_palette: oceanic blue, gold, weathered leather brown, deep black
Nast.source_notes: Mentioned as the leader of the pirates who robbed the Alfalfa; age and appearance guessed based on title 'King of the Five Seas'.

Mr. Wayne.primary_clothing: Victorian gentleman's indoor suit, dark charcoal waistcoat, white shirt
Mr. Wayne.face_description: Mature face with kind but inquisitive eyes, clean-shaven, dignified expression.
Mr. Wayne.visual_anchor: Late 40s male, salt and pepper hair, neat Victorian indoor suit, mature face with inquisitive brown eyes.

Mrs. Wayne.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian house dress, dark blue with lace collar
Mrs. Wayne.face_description: Gentle face with soft features, maternal and caring expression.
Mrs. Wayne.visual_anchor: Mid-40s female, brown hair in a bun, wearing a dark blue Victorian house dress with a lace collar, gentle maternal face.
Mrs. Wayne.source_notes: Mentioned as part of the Wayne couple, parents of Anna.

Tris.primary_clothing: Simple linen shirt, dark vest, worn trousers
Tris.face_description: Round and amiable face, shy like a girl, soft features that appear unremarkable.
Tris.visual_anchor: Late teens male, round and amiable face with a shy expression, fair skin, light brown hair, wearing a simple vest and linen shirt.
Tris.color_palette: pale cream, light brown, muted grey
Tris.distinguishing_features: Very shy demeanor, good conversationalist when familiar
Tris.source_notes: Described by Joyce as a 'hero' on the Alfalfa who led the assault against murderers.

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Hears illusory whispers of 'Hornacis... Flegrea...' when near Antigonus-related locations
Klein Moretti.accessories: exquisite-looking silver chain with a chunk of pure topaz (spirit pendulum) kept in his left sleeve
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Text explicitly confirms his eye color as dark brown.

Angelica.face_description: Beautiful face with soft features and a pleasant smile.
Angelica.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, beautiful face with a pleasant smile, wearing a modest elegant Victorian dress
Angelica.source_notes: Text explicitly refers to her as 'the beautiful Angelica'.

Glacis.primary_clothing: formal suit with a black bow tie
Glacis.face_description: Slightly dark skin with dark green pupils, topped with soft light yellow hair
Glacis.visual_anchor: mid-30s male, slightly dark skin, soft light yellow hair, dark green eyes, wearing a white shirt and black vest with a monocle
Glacis.color_palette: black, white, light yellow, dark green
Glacis.distinguishing_features: Slightly dark skin, dark green pupils
Glacis.source_notes: He has recovered from his illness and now believes Klein is a 'magical doctor'.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Seen tapping a plain cane while negotiating rent.

Melissa Moretti.hair_style: black hair that reached down her back
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times, old veiled hat
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned when she was looking at the new house.

Mrs. Shaud.primary_clothing: Victorian morning gown or afternoon tea dress
Mrs. Shaud.face_description: typical Victorian middle-class lady, gentle but slightly haughty features
Mrs. Shaud.visual_anchor: 30s female, fair skin, neat brown updo, wearing a respectable Victorian morning gown
Mrs. Shaud.source_notes: Mentioned as a neighbor at 4 Daffodil Street making a formal visit. Physical traits guessed based on her middle-class status.
